turns.content: What brings you in today?
My stomach's been hurting off and on. Don't really feel like eating much either. Just wanted to get it checked out.
When did this start?
Started a few weeks ago. Three weeks maybe? It just comes and goes.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
It's right here, in the middle. Under my ribs. Kind of a dull ache, not sharp or anything. Sometimes after eating it feels worse, like heavy or full.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No, no fever. Haven't felt hot or anything like that. Just the stomach stuff.
What medications are you currently taking?
Just some blood pressure pills. Don't remember the name. And I've been taking Tums for the stomach, but it doesn't really help.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Yeah, high blood pressure. That's about it.
Are you allergic to any medications?
No, I don't think so. Never had a problem with any medicine.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
Just the Tums I mentioned. They don't really do much. Sometimes lying down makes it worse, so I've been sitting up more.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Eating makes it worse, especially if I eat too much. Sitting up helps a little. Not much else.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
I work as a cashier, so I'm on my feet a lot. Lately I just feel tired and don't want to eat at work. It's slowing me down.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
No, I don't smoke. I'll have a drink now and then, but not much. Stomach doesn't like it anyway.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
I don't really know. My mom had some stomach trouble, but she passed a while back. Never talked much about it.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No, not like this. I've had heartburn before, but this is different. Lasts longer.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
Yeah, I think so. You're saying my stomach's acting up and the Tums aren't cutting it. What's next?
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physical, maybe a 3. It's there but I can still work. Emotionally? I'd say a 2. I'm not panicked, just tired of it.
Do you have any questions for me?
Not really. Just want to know what you think it is and if I need to do any test or something to figure it out.
What do you think might be going on?
I don't know, that's why I came to you. Maybe something with my stomach or digestion? You tell me.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
I don't think so. Just been tired more than usual. That's all.
